---
title: "figure1"
author: "JuHyeongYu"
date: "2026-03-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(cowplot)
library(grid)

# 1. Canvas Initialization
final_figure_1_page <- ggdraw() +
  
# 2. Top Tier: Fig 1a & Fig 1b

draw_plot(fig1a, x = 0.03, y = 0.67, width = 0.70, height = 0.30) +
  draw_label("a", x = 0.03, y = 0.94, size = 30, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # Placeholder for blank figure 1b
  draw_label("Fig 1b", x = 0.85, y = 0.80, size = 15, fontface = "bold", color = "grey70") +
  draw_label("b", x = 0.74, y = 0.94, size = 30, fontface = "bold") +
  

# 3. Middle Tier: Fig 1c (Expanded Heatmap)

draw_grob(fig1c, x = 0.05, y = 0.30, width = 0.8, height = 0.38) +
  draw_label("c", x = 0.03, y = 0.65, size = 30, fontface = "bold") +
  
# 4. Bottom Tier: Fig 1d & Fig 1e

draw_plot(fig1d, x = 0.05, y = 0.02, width = 0.35, height = 0.30) +
  draw_label("d", x = 0.03, y = 0.32, size = 30, fontface = "bold") +
  
  draw_plot(fig1e, x = 0.42, y = 0.02, width = 0.68, height = 0.30) +
  draw_label("e", x = 0.42, y = 0.32, size = 30, fontface = "bold")

# 5. save & Export

ggsave("Figure1_Final.pdf", 
       final_figure_1_page, 
       width = 24, 
       height = 28, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 600,
       device = cairo_pdf) # Use cairo_pdf 

```
